note: All references use entities from disambiguated.txt only.

terminal_states.name: application-opens-and-strategy-trades-live
terminal_states.description: The person opens the application, toggles a strategy-state to on with strategy-assigned-capital > 0, and within one live-price-feed poll cycle at least one paper-fill is recorded whose source = the toggled strategy-id.
observable_signals: dashboard.active-strategies-panel shows the toggled strategy with on pill
dashboard.recent-trades-panel lists ≥1 new paper-fill with source = strategy-id
paper-trades.ledger-table contains ≥1 row matching the toggled strategy within 60 seconds of toggle-on
terminal_states.satisfies_north_star_clause: Strategy toggled on, paper trades execute against live or historical market data

terminal_states.name: backtest-produces-scored-results
terminal_states.description: The person selects a strategy-id, ≥1 platform, a date-range, and a simulated-bankroll on the backtest screen, clicks run-backtest-button, and receives a backtest-result containing final-equity, sharpe-ratio, brier-score, win-rate, and an equity-curve-series. No real-money api is contacted during the run.
observable_signals: backtest.results-panel displays non-null final-equity, sharpe-ratio, brier-score, win-rate tiles
backtest.equity-curve renders a polyline with ≥2 points
adapter call log contains zero outbound calls to live trading endpoints during the run
terminal_states.satisfies_north_star_clause: Backtest runs and returns scored results without any real money changing hands

terminal_states.name: cross-platform-and-cross-time-comparison
terminal_states.description: The person adds two or more comparison-run entries on the compare screen that cover (a) at least two distinct platforms, or (b) at least two distinct date-ranges, and sees a single overlay-pnl-chart with color-coded series per run plus a comparison-table listing pnl, sharpe-ratio, brier-score, and win-rate per run.
observable_signals: comparison-table rows cover ≥2 distinct platforms OR ≥2 distinct date-ranges
terminal_states.satisfies_north_star_clause: Strategy performance can be compared across platforms and time ranges from a single local dashboard
